## UNIQUE CONTRIBUTIONS (vs SLSC4/SLM/SLP/SLPFT)

### 1. Inner World Depth
SLSP provides the DEEPEST coverage of Belfort's inner game:
- **Belief mechanics:** Table/Legs Model, Root Experience Model, Timeline Regression (full guided NLP methodology)
- **Standards framework:** 4 Levels (Poor/Good/Excellent/Extraordinary), Thermostat Model, Ducks vs Eagles archetype
- **State management details:** Anchoring Exercise (7 steps), Physiology-First approach, VAK-G-O modalities
- **Vision system:** Vision Triad, Dream Stomper Defense, 8-Step Goal Setting, Vision Creation Process

### 2. Customer Retention (Entirely New)
This content does NOT exist in SLSC4, SLM, SLP, or SLPFT:
- **Customers for Life:** 6 Strategies for retention, Post-Sale Certainty Shift, Ingratiation Model
- **Referral System:** 6-Step methodology, language patterns, timing rules
- **Post-Sale Strategy:** Never duck calls, competitor referrals, thank-you note methodology

### 3. Prospecting & Qualifying (New Depth)
Enhanced qualifying coverage beyond SLSC4:
- **4 Buying Archetypes:** Buyers in Heat, Buyers in Power, Looky-Loos, Dragged
- **Sales Funnel Reverse Engineering:** 120 dials → 40 connects → 8 appointments → 2 sales methodology
- **Qualifying Questions Hierarchy:** 7-question Big Picture framework
- **Pain Preservation Model:** Never solve pain during qualifying

### 4. Script Building Methodology
More detailed than SLSC4 on how to actually BUILD scripts:
- 5-6 language patterns per Ten, pooling, master script creation
- 5 Qualities of Effective Scripts
- Script Practice Methodology (record, review, refine)

### 5. Enhanced Tonality Framework
While 8 Tonalities are in SLSC4, SLSP adds:
- Physiological Anchor Discovery Method (find YOUR gestures)
- Script Tonal Mapping Method (mark tonal shifts in script)
- Opening Tonality Sequence (specific pattern for first 15 seconds)
